typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		name as string,
		emplid as string,
		fte as string,
		union as string,
		Code as string,
		SumCode as string,
		awpp_hours as integer,
		paid_sick_hours as integer,
		overtime_hours as integer,
		hours as integer,
		fiscal_year as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_period as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_short_period as string,
		fiscal_period as string,
		fiscal_year_period as string,
		location as string,
		DESCRIPTION as string,
		business_unit_description as string,
		business_unit as string,
		dept_site_name as string,
		department_code as string,
		manager as string,
		business_unit_key as integer,
		department_site_key as integer,
		end_date as integer,
		deptid as string,
		department_key as integer,
		descr as string,
		department as string,
		Expr1 as string,
		descrshort as string,
		short_description as string,
		full_part_time as string,
		current_status as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT e.name,        p.emplid,        cast(case when j.fte = 1.00 then 1 else j.fte end as varchar) as fte ,        u.short_description   AS [union],        cast(p.trc as varchar) as Code,                                    COALESCE(app.list_id, sick.list_id, ot.list_id, cast(p.trc as varchar)) as SumCode,        CASE          WHEN app.list_id = \'APP_HOURS\' THEN Sum(p.tl_quantity)          ELSE 0        END             AS awpp_hours,        CASE          WHEN sick.list_id = \'APP_PAIDSICK\' THEN Sum(p.tl_quantity)          ELSE 0        END             AS paid_sick_hours,        CASE          WHEN ot.list_id = \'APP_OVERTIME\' THEN Sum(p.tl_quantity)          ELSE 0        END             AS overtime_hours,        Sum(p.tl_quantity)      AS hours,        d.fiscal_year,        d.fiscal_year_final_year_period,        d.fiscal_year_final_year_short_period,        d.fiscal_period,        d.fiscal_year_period,        l.descr         AS location,        ds.DESCRIPTION,        bu.business_unit_description,        bu.business_unit,        ds.name         AS dept_site_name,        ds.department_code,        m.name          AS manager,        bu.business_unit_key,        ds.department_site_key,        Max(d.date_key) AS end_date,        dpt.deptid,        dpt.department_key,        dpt.descr,        dpt.department,        l.location      AS Expr1,        l.descrshort,        u.short_description,        j.full_part_time,        cj.employment_status as current_status        FROM  [ps_hcm].[ps_tl_payable_time]  AS p 				left outer join hr.dim_job AS j 		ON j.emplid = p.emplid             AND j.empl_rcd = p.empl_rcd 				and j.effective_from = (select MAX(effective_from) from hr.dim_job where emplid = j.emplid and empl_rcd = j.empl_rcd and effective_from <=GETDATE()) 				left outer join hr.dim_job cj 			on p.emplid = cj.emplid and cj.effective_to is null 		LEFT outer join hr.dim_department AS dpt          ON dpt.department_key = j.department_key        LEFT OUTER JOIN hr.dim_business_unit AS bu          ON j.business_unit_key = bu.business_unit_key                                                              left join  [ps_hcm].[ps_tl_val_list_dtl]   app  			on p.trc = app.valuegroup  and app.list_id  = \'APP_HOURS\'    		left join  [ps_hcm].[ps_tl_val_list_dtl]   ot  			on p.trc = ot.valuegroup  and ot.list_id  = \'APP_OVERTIME\'   		left join  [ps_hcm].[ps_tl_val_list_dtl]   sick  			on p.trc = sick.valuegroup  and sick.list_id  = \'APP_PAIDSICK\'   		        LEFT OUTER JOIN shared.dim_date AS d          ON p.dur = d.DATE        LEFT OUTER JOIN hr.dim_employee AS e          ON p.emplid = e.emplid        LEFT OUTER JOIN hr.dim_union AS u          ON j.union_key = u.union_key        LEFT OUTER JOIN hr.dim_location AS l          ON j.location_key = l.location_key        LEFT OUTER JOIN shared.dim_department_site AS ds          ON j.department_site_key = ds.department_site_key        LEFT OUTER JOIN hr.dim_job AS jm          ON cj.reports_to_job_key = jm.job_key        LEFT OUTER JOIN hr.dim_employee AS m          ON jm.employee_key = m.employee_key WHERE          ( p.dur > Dateadd(d, -370, Getdate()) )                               GROUP  BY e.name,           p.emplid,           j.fte,            u.DESCRIPTION,           p.trc,           d.fiscal_year,           d.fiscal_year_final_year_period,           d.fiscal_year_final_year_short_period,           d.fiscal_period,           d.fiscal_year_period,           l.descr,           ds.DESCRIPTION,           bu.business_unit_description,           bu.business_unit,           ds.name,           ds.department_code,           m.name,           bu.business_unit_key,           ds.department_site_key,           dpt.deptid,           dpt.department_key,           dpt.descr,           dpt.department,           l.location,           l.descrshort,           u.short_description,           app.list_id, sick.list_id, ot.list_id,           j.full_part_time, 		cj.employment_status ORDER  BY name',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive({Copy of SumCode} = toString(SumCode),
		{Copy of Code} = toString(Code)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion sink(input(
		department_code as string,
		end_date as integer,
		fiscal_year_period as string,
		short_description as string,
		code as string,
		department_site_key as integer,
		deptid as string,
		description as string,
		business_unit_key as integer,
		business_unit_description as string,
		paid_sick_hours as integer,
		fiscal_year as string,
		fte as string,
		fiscal_period as string,
		department_key as integer,
		expr1 as string,
		department as string,
		hours as integer,
		overtime_hours as integer,
		manager as string,
		sum_code as string,
		union as string,
		dept_site_name as string,
		awpp_hours as integer,
		business_unit as string,
		emplid as string,
		descr as string,
		full_part_time as string,
		descrshort as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_short_period as string,
		name as string,
		current_status as string,
		location as string,
		fiscal_year_final_year_period as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		department_code,
		end_date,
		fiscal_year_period,
		short_description,
		code = Code,
		department_site_key,
		deptid,
		description = DESCRIPTION,
		business_unit_key,
		business_unit_description,
		paid_sick_hours,
		fiscal_year,
		fte,
		fiscal_period,
		department_key,
		expr1 = Expr1,
		department,
		hours,
		overtime_hours,
		manager,
		sum_code = SumCode,
		union,
		dept_site_name,
		awpp_hours,
		business_unit,
		emplid,
		descr,
		full_part_time,
		descrshort,
		fiscal_year_final_year_short_period,
		name,
		current_status,
		location,
		fiscal_year_final_year_period)) ~> OLEDBDestination
